records.ety: [Akin to Icel. glotta to smile scornfully, G. glotzen to gloat.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Gloated; p. pr. & vb. n. Gloating.]

defs: To gaze with malignant satisfaction; to exult maliciously, sometimes also triumphantly, in another's loss or discomfort; -- usually in a bad sense.
quotes: In vengeance gloating on another's pain.
